name: rocky
description: rocky Claude Code plugin (Bun runtime). 7 openapi_* tools (cache-first OpenAPI / Swagger spec inspection, endpoint search, tag list) + seo_validate (OG / Twitter Card / JSON-LD / favicon meta validation via ogpeek) + notion_* tools (cache-first Notion page read + refresh diff, delegated to the ntn CLI, registered only when ntn is detected). Archived domains (journal / mysql / spec-pact / pr-watch) re-enter as separate PRs.
